rationale: Educ. Code §29.0881 governs the Strong Foundations Grant Program and its funding sources. It does not reference the homestead exemption amount or Tax Code §11.13(b), so increasing the exemption creates no direct conflict.
quote: The commissioner shall use funds appropriated, federal funds, and other funds available for the strong foundations grant program to assist school districts and open-enrollment charter schools in implementing the program.
_note: No direct statutory linkage between §29.0881 funding mechanics and the homestead exemption amount. Indirect fiscal pressure on school district revenue is not a textual conflict with this provision.
